news_items.headline: WBC 2026: Team USA-Dominican Republic live updates, analysis
news_items.description: Who will win Sunday's star-studded World Baseball Classic semifinal? We've got you covered with players to watch, live updates and postgame takeaways.

news_items.headline: Venezuela rallies to stun Japan, advances to WBC semifinals
news_items.description: Wilyer Abreu hit a go-ahead, three-run shot in the sixth as Venezuela rallied to stun defending champion Japan and advance to the World Baseball Classic semifinals.

news_items.headline: Italy tops Puerto Rico, rides magical WBC run into semifinals
news_items.description: Italy continued its charmed run through the World Baseball Classic, earning a spot in the semifinals after dispatching Puerto Rico 8-6.

news_items.headline: Cubs' Seiya Suzuki (knee) exits Japan's WBC quarterfinal loss
news_items.description: Chicago Cubs outfielder Seiya Suzuki exited Japan's World Baseball Classic quarterfinal matchup against Venezuela because of right knee discomfort.

news_items.headline: Yordan Alvarez's home run gives Houston Astros the lead
news_items.description: Yordan Alvarez (Houston Astros) with a Spectacular Hit New York Mets, 03/14/2026

news_items.headline: Matt Olson bashes a 2-run dinger for the Braves
news_items.description: Matt Olson bashes a 2-run dinger for the Braves
